title: LTX latent previews: pace VHS multi-frame bursts to 8fps motion in the gallery card (+ Wan follow-up scoped)
description: Follow-up to MPI-166. LTX live latent previews now reach the app, but they're a MULTI-FRAME VHS sequence (the KJNodes LTX2SamplingPreviewOverride emits N frames per sampling step via a send_sync(PREVIEW_IMAGE) loop + a VHS_latentpreview text event, played at 8fps). The browser plays the motion; the app painted each frame on arrival onto a single , so a burst of N frames flashed to the last one instead of showing motion. FIX (client-side, MpiGalleryGrid card): queue incoming preview frames and release one per ~8fps tick via setInterval, reusing the existing _setPreviewImageSrc/. Bounded queue (PREVIEW_QUEUE_MAX=16, drop+revoke oldest on overflow so fast sampling can't grow it). Also fixes a pre-existing blob-URL LEAK: consumed/dropped preview blob URLs are now URL.revokeObjectURL'd (nothing revoked them before). Timer stops in _clearPreviewImage (called by setDone/refreshGroup/re-arm). No gen-speed cost — frames already arrive + decode; this is pure client paint cadence. Zero new deps, ~40 lines. Files: js/components/Compounds/MpiGalleryGrid/MpiGalleryGrid.js. Self-checked (scratchpad pacing sim: queue bound + one-frame/tick + no-leak PASS); lint clean. LOCAL-VERIFY PENDING: run an LTX gen, confirm the card plays smooth motion (not flashing) + no console blob errors. WAN does NOT benefit from this fix — investigation (agent, 2026-06-30) confirmed Wan sends SINGLE-frame previews (core TAEHVPreviewerImpl x0[:1,:,:1] = frame 0 only, SamplerCustom, no VHS, no override node). Wan motion previews would need a SERVER-side change — the cheap candidate is setting workflow['extra']['VHS_latentpreview']=true in the Wan workflow JSON so VHS's WrappedPreviewer hook wraps the previewer and emits the N-frame sequence (needs verifying it gives a multi-frame previewer for lighttaew2_2, not the single-frame one). That's a SEPARATE card (build-script/template + Pod test), spun off — NOT in this card's scope. BRANCH: RunPod. Relates: MPI-166 (the preview wiring), and the Wan-motion-preview follow-up.
activeSessionTitle: MPI-167 — LTX motion previews SHIPPED + USER-VERIFIED: 8fps looping clip in gallery card + per-stage reset on VHS event
outcome: SHIPPED + USER-VERIFIED local 2026-06-30 ('now it's perfect'). LTX previews are a multi-frame MOTION clip (KJNodes override sends frame-position windows as instant bursts via synchronous Thread.run()). Card (MpiGalleryGrid.js) buffers frames in a rolling clip, cycles at 8fps, LOOPS until gen ends (PREVIEW_CLIP_MAX=48; evicted/teardown blob URLs revoked = also fixes a pre-existing preview-URL leak). KEY: per-stage reset — each sampler stage fires a VHS_latentpreview text WS event once; without resetting on it, multi-stage gens CONCATENATE their loops into one growing clip (the bug the user caught). Plumbed: comfyController._routeMessage routes VHS_latentpreview to active prompt -> commandExecutor -> exec.onPreviewReset -> activeGenerations.resetPreview -> generation:preview-reset event -> card.resetPreviewClip(). 6 files: comfyController.js, commandExecutor.js, generationService.js, activeGenerations.js, MpiGalleryGrid.js, MpiGalleryBlock.js. Lint clean, pacing+loop+reset self-checked (scratchpad sims PASS). The app side is now MODEL-AGNOSTIC: any workflow emitting VHS multi-frame previews gets looping motion for free. FOLLOW-UP (separate card, server-side, NOT started): enable Wan motion previews via workflow['extra']['VHS_latentpreview']=true OR the override node — Wan currently sends core single-frame previews. Detail in docs/gotchas.md § 'LTX live latent previews' (4).
